errors.deferred_date_required: A date is required to defer this ticket
errors.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.invitation_not_found: Invitation not found or no longer pending
errors.cannot_remove_last_admin: Cannot remove admin access from the last remaining Administrator/Board account
errors.user_has_history_cannot_delete: This user has activity history and can't be permanently deleted -- deactivate them instead
errors.requester_cannot_self_approve: The requester may not approve their own purchase request (two-person approval principle).
errors.no_permission: You don't have permission to do this
errors.group_name_taken: A group with this name already exists
errors.user_already_in_group: This user is already assigned to this group

overview.title: Tickets
overview.reactivated_notice: {count} postponed ticket(s) just became active again.

form.title: New ticket
form.info_banner: Manual creation for tickets that didn't arrive by email. Incoming emails to the configured ticket inbox are automatically turned into tickets (background fetch every 2 minutes).

detail.reply_help_text: Replies are sent by email to the sender (provided the ticket inbox is configured under /admin/settings). Internal notes are never sent.
detail.assignment_help_text: The assignee receives an email notification.
detail.member_multiple_candidates_help: Multiple members use this email address – please choose manually.

login.title: Login – Gartenverein
login.subtitle: Please sign in
login.no_account_notice: No account? An invitation is required.

invitation_expired.title: Invitation expired
invitation_expired.heading: Invitation expired
invitation_expired.message: This invitation link is no longer valid or has already been used.

dashboard.heading: User management
dashboard.update_available_text: You're running v{current}; v{latest} has been released. To update:
dashboard.update_up_to_date: Running v{version} -- up to date (last checked {checked_at})
dashboard.update_not_checked_yet: Running v{version} -- not checked for updates yet
dashboard.delete_invitation_confirm: Delete this pending invitation? The link will stop working.

edit.heading: Edit user
edit.legacy_role_text: This account's access comes from its role, not group membership.
edit.remove_legacy_role_text: Remove this account's Administrator/Board role and switch it to group-based access instead.
edit.remove_access_text: Deactivating removes this user's access immediately. Their name stays attached to anything they created or were assigned -- nothing is deleted.
edit.delete_text: Permanently deleting a user removes the account entirely. Only possible if they have no history anywhere in the system (no created records, approvals, readings, etc.) -- otherwise, deactivate instead.
edit.delete_confirm: Permanently delete this user? This cannot be undone.
edit.delete_blocked_text: This user has activity history somewhere in the system (created records, approvals, meter readings, etc.) and can't be permanently deleted. Deactivate them instead.

settings.heading: Club settings
settings.language_help: Applies to the whole installation (all users see the same language). If a translation is missing for a given module, the German text is shown automatically.
settings.module_help: Not every club uses every feature area. Disabled modules disappear from the navigation -- the data is preserved and reappears once re-enabled.
settings.nav_order_help: Sets the order of the sidebar's navigation items. Lower numbers appear first; the spacing of 100 leaves room to slot a new position between two existing ones later.
settings.finance_help: Shown on every invoice's footer, and used to number invoices ({year}/{sequence}, resets every year).
settings.updates_toggle_hint: Periodically checks GitHub for a newer Parcella release and shows a notice on the admin dashboard. No credentials are sent -- just a public release lookup.
settings.email_help: A single mailbox for everything: system emails (invitations) are sent via SMTP, and the ticket system uses the same mailbox to send replies and additionally polls it via IMAP to capture incoming requests as tickets.
settings.spam_help: Built-in heuristics (sender-domain/keyword blocklist, link count) run immediately with no external service. An external check API is optional and only used if a URL is configured -- an outage of the external API never blocks ticket creation.

fields.invoice_number_start: Starting invoice number (for the first year invoiced)

modules.work_hours_desc: Work sessions, sponsorships, club roles, and annual report. Disable if the club doesn't collect mandatory work hours.
modules.water_desc: Water meters, readings, and consumption reports. Disable if the club doesn't manage its own water supply.
modules.electricity_desc: Electricity meters, readings, and consumption reports. Disable if the club doesn't manage its own electricity supply.
modules.insurance_desc: Property and accident insurance per parcel, incl. annual report. Disable if the club doesn't handle insurance through the software.
modules.tickets_desc: Support tickets with assignment, status, and member matching. Disable if the club doesn't use an internal ticket system.
modules.purchase_requests_desc: Two-person approval principle for club expenses: submit requests, have them approved or rejected by two board members.
modules.calendar_desc: Community calendar (meetings, inspections, work sessions), member birthdays, and council presence/absence tracking, each with an ICS export. Disable if your association doesn't need these.
modules.public_signup_api_desc: Lets an external website (e.g. a WordPress plugin) submit work-session signups without a Parcella login. Off by default since it opens a public write endpoint; see the Integrations page for the access token.
modules.announcements_desc: Author club news once and prepare it for the blog, member email, and a printable notice.
modules.inventory_desc: Track everything the club owns (and personal items members store on club property), grouped into your own categories, with an optional lending system for borrowable items.
modules.cloud_storage_desc: Let board members browse, upload to, and download from a Nextcloud folder per parcel -- lease agreements, membership paperwork, ticket correspondence. Configure the connection under Admin -> Integrations first.
modules.tasks_desc: A general-purpose kanban board (To Do / In Progress / Done) for club business that isn't tied to a work session -- e.g. "renew the insurance policy", "call the electrician". Admin/board only.
modules.finances_desc: Prepare and send annual invoices per parcel, with usage-based line items and payment tracking. Configure bank details below first.

settings.region_help: Determines number and address format (e.g. thousands separator, order of postal code and city). Independent of the interface language.
settings.currency_help: Determines the symbol and position used for monetary amounts (e.g. "19,99 €" vs. "£19.99"). Selectable independently of language and region.
settings.logo_help: PNG, JPEG, WebP, or SVG, maximum 2 MB. Replaces the tree icon in the sidebar.
settings.logo_remove_label: Remove logo (revert to the default icon)
settings.logo_error_type: Invalid file type. Please upload PNG, JPEG, WebP, or SVG.
settings.logo_error_size: The file is too large (maximum 2 MB).

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.token_regenerated: A new API token has been generated. Update any connected sites with the new value.
integrations.module_disabled_notice: The public signup API is currently disabled, so these endpoints are not reachable.
integrations.public_signup_api_desc: Lets any CMS (WordPress, TYPO3, Contao, or your own site) submit work-session signups through a small connector, without members needing a Parcella login. A reference WordPress plugin is included in the project's integrations folder.
integrations.regenerate_confirm: Regenerating the token immediately breaks any connector still using the old one. Continue?
integrations.regenerate_hint: Regenerating invalidates the current token immediately. Update all connected sites afterwards.
integrations.wordpress_hint: A reference WordPress connector plugin is included in the project's integrations/wordpress folder.
integrations.wordpress_blog_desc: Used by the Announcements module to publish blog drafts. Create an Application Password under your WordPress user profile (Users -> Profile -> Application Passwords) -- don't use your regular WordPress login password here.
integrations.wordpress_app_password_hint: Not your regular WordPress login password -- generate one under your WordPress user profile.
integrations.nextcloud_desc: Lets board members browse, upload to, and download from a folder in your club's Nextcloud instance for each parcel -- lease agreements, membership paperwork, ticket correspondence. Create an app password under your Nextcloud user's Security settings (Settings -> Security -> Devices & sessions) -- don't use your regular Nextcloud login password here.
integrations.cloud_storage_module_disabled_notice: The cloud storage connector is currently disabled, so parcel documents won't be shown.
integrations.nextcloud_app_password_hint: Not your regular Nextcloud login password -- generate one under your Nextcloud user's Security settings.

sample_data.title: Sample data
sample_data.what_intro: Populates a fresh installation with realistic demo data across every module, so you can explore the app before entering real records.
sample_data.what_core: Core: 6 members, 5 garden plots, and their assignments (including one shared household and one former tenant)
sample_data.what_work_hours: Work hours: a yearly configuration, a past and an upcoming work session with participants, and a few tasks
sample_data.what_metering: Metering: a water and an electricity meter with two years of readings
sample_data.what_insurance: Insurance: yearly configuration, property packages, and coverage for two plots
sample_data.what_tickets: Tickets: a handful of sample tickets across different statuses
sample_data.what_purchase_requests: Purchase requests: an open, an approved, and a rejected request
sample_data.what_calendar: Calendar: a few past and upcoming community events
sample_data.what_inventory: Inventory: categories, a few items, and one outstanding loan
sample_data.what_tasks: Task board: a few cards spread across all three columns
sample_data.safety_note: Every row this creates is tracked, so "Remove all sample data" deletes exactly what was generated -- nothing you enter yourself is ever touched. No user accounts are ever created or modified by this feature.
sample_data.remove_confirm: Really remove all sample data? This cannot be undone.
sample_data.blocked_real_data: This club already has real member/parcel data -- sample data can only be added to a fresh installation. Remove the existing data first if you really want to start over.
sample_data.fresh_install_hint: This installation looks fresh -- no member or parcel data yet.
sample_data.add_confirm: Add sample data across every module now?

groups.heading: Groups
groups.intro: New users are assigned to groups instead of a role. A group can grant read/write/delete on specific modules -- e.g. full control over Water for whoever is responsible for it -- or, using the two checkboxes below, the same full access an Administrator or Board account has, including this administration panel if needed. Existing Administrator/Board accounts keep working exactly as before and don't need a group.
groups.no_assignable_users: No users available to assign yet -- accounts with a legacy Administrator or Board role don't need a group.
groups.all_assignable_users_already_members: All Treasurer and Read-only accounts are already assigned to this group.
groups.no_groups: No groups yet. Create one to get started.
groups.delete_confirm: Delete this group? Users assigned to it will lose the access it granted.

list.title: Members
list.search_placeholder: Search by name or parcel number…
list.csv_multi_help: Separate multiple email addresses / phone numbers with a semicolon.
list.csv_template_tip: Tip: just use a {link} as a template.

detail.danger_zone_text: Marks {name} as deleted. The member disappears from lists and search results, but the data stays in the database -- existing parcel assignments, tickets, work sessions, etc. remain untouched. For a normal end of membership, set "Member until" in the edit form instead of deleting.

signin_sheet.title: Meeting sign-in sheet
signin_sheet.description: Generates a PDF list of all current members, grouped by parcel, with a signature line for each -- for printing and bringing to a general meeting.
signin_sheet.headline_hint: Shown at the top of the PDF. Feel free to edit it.

list.title: Parcels
list.csv_format_help: Format: semicolon-separated CSV with columns: plot number; area (sqm); status; notes

form.status_help: The time of a status change is automatically logged in the change history -- a separate termination date isn't needed.
form.danger_zone_text: Permanently deletes parcel {plot_number} from the database -- unlike the "Deleted" status, which preserves history. All member assignments for this parcel are removed as well; water connections are kept but without a parcel reference. This action cannot be undone.
form.delete_confirm: Really PERMANENTLY delete parcel {plot_number}? This cannot be undone.

detail.select_member_from_list: Please select a member from the list
detail.delete_history_confirm: Really delete this entry permanently? This cannot be undone.
detail.cannot_delete_active_assignment: An active assignment cannot be deleted -- please end the tenancy first.
detail.cloud_no_folder_hint: No folder configured yet for the current tenancy. Set the path to the folder already shared with these tenants in Nextcloud.
detail.cloud_not_configured: Nextcloud is not configured yet. Set it up under Admin -> Integrations.
detail.cloud_no_active_folder: No active folder is configured for this parcel.

form.title: Announcement
form.error_missing_fields: Please provide both a title and a body text.
form.error_invalid_image_type: Please upload a PNG, JPEG, or WebP image.
form.error_image_too_large: The image is too large (maximum 5 MB).
form.image_hint: PNG, JPEG, or WebP, up to 5 MB. Used as the blog's featured image and shown in the email.
form.body_hint: Written in Markdown. This same text is used for both the blog draft and the member email.
form.print_override_hint: Leave empty to print the full text above. If it doesn't fit on one page, a shortened version will be suggested here -- feel free to edit it.
form.print_too_long: Likely too long for one printed page -- consider shortening.
form.send_email_confirm: Send this announcement by email to all current members with email notifications enabled?
form.save_does_not_send_hint: Saving only stores your changes -- it doesn't send or publish anything. Use the buttons below once you're ready.
form.test_email_hint: Sends the current content to one address for review. Never counted as a real send and never goes to members.
form.test_email_failed: Could not send the test email -- check the SMTP configuration under Admin -> Settings.
form.sending_refresh_hint: In progress -- reload this page to see the latest count.

categories.title: Inventory Categories
categories.error_duplicate_name: A category with this name already exists.
categories.delete_confirm: Delete this category? Items in it will just become uncategorized, not deleted.

form.title: Inventory Item
form.error_missing_owner_member: Please select which member owns this.
form.owner_hint: For items members store on club property but own personally -- still tracked here (e.g. for insurance/liability records).
form.financials_hint: Current value is entered/updated manually whenever someone checks -- there's no automatic depreciation calculation.
form.is_borrowable_hint: Enables the checkout/return system for this item.
form.default_loan_fee_hint: Pre-fills the fee when checking this item out; can still be changed per loan.

detail.retire_confirm: Mark this item as retired (no longer owned/in service)? It stays on record, just excluded from the active list by default.
detail.delete_confirm: Permanently delete this item and its entire loan history? This cannot be undone -- use "Retire" instead if you just want to mark it as no longer owned.
detail.retired_notice: This item is retired -- no longer owned/in service.
detail.none_available: None available to borrow right now.
